heading: Add Users to an Organization
body:
> **Important:** 
>
> Atlas limits Atlas user membership to a maximum of 500
> Atlas users per organization.

Atlas CLI

To invite a user to your organization using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas users invite [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas users invite](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-users-invite).

Atlas UI
